title: Accordion

    the native HTML arrow, check out how to add your own custom marker.

title: Anchor
description:
A structural primitive for positioning floating content relative to an
      anchor element using CSS Anchor Positioning.
    
    
      
        Add the .anchor class to a container. The first child becomes
        the anchor target. Place floating content inside .anchor-floating. Use --anchor-position-area to control placement.
headings: Always Visible Hover Trigger Used By

      anchor element using CSS Anchor Positioning.

headings: Always Visible Hover Trigger Used By

title: Badge
description:
A badge is a small status indicator that can be placed on other elements.
    
    
      
        Badge extends Anchor. Add .anchor and .badge classes to the container, wrap the indicator in
        .anchor-floating.
headings: Variants Severities Visibility Alignment

title: List
description:
Lists are continuous, vertical indexes of text and images and video.
    
      Use lists to help users find a specific item and act on it
      Order list items in logical ways (like alphabetical or numerical)
      Three sizes: one-line, two-line, and three-line
      Keep items short and easy to scan
      Show icons, text, and actions in a consistent format
headings: Configurations Variants Clickable list item Selected item Text Start items Icon Avatar Image Video End items Keyboard command Checkbox Radio Switch Inset Gutterless Borders On every item On one item Dense

        wrapper. Wire interestfor on the trigger to the
        .anchor-floating[popover="hint"] element's ID.

title: Browser support
description:
These are the (most interesting) web platform features used by Open Props
    UI! If you're here concerned about what components you actually can use
    today, this should hopefully get you more informed.

title: Browser support
description:
These are the (most interesting) web platform features used by Open Props
    UI! If you're here concerned about what components you actually can use
    today, this should hopefully get you more informed.

title: Why Open Props UI?
description:
A CSS UI library exploring how next-gen HTML & CSS features can change the
    way we create components. Designed to be used by professional teams as well
    as tinkering hobbyists.
headings: Backstory The goal of OPUI

title: Why Open Props UI?
description:
A CSS UI library exploring how next-gen HTML & CSS features can change the
    way we create components. Designed to be used by professional teams as well
    as tinkering hobbyists.
headings: Backstory The goal of OPUI

title: Getting started
description:
OPUI ships first-class Astro components. Install the package, import what
    you need, and you're set.
headings: Install via NPM Use a component Load the CSS

title: Getting started
description:
Open Props UI is a CSS UI library exploring how next-gen HTML & CSS features
    can change the way we create components. Designed to be used by professional
    teams as well as tinkering hobbyists.
headings: Install manually theme.css generator Install via NPM Usage Install via CDN

title: Anchor API
description: Reference for Anchor Astro component.
headings: alignment string "start end" trigger "always" | "hover" "always"

title: Anchor API
description: Reference for Anchor HTML component.
headings: Container .anchor - Floating .anchor-floating - Position --anchor-position-area start end Trigger data-trigger="hover" -

title: Accordion API
description: Reference for Accordion Astro component.
headings: Group Card[role="group"] - name string - open boolean false Accordion open state. variant "default" The visual variant of the accordion.

title: Accordion API
description: Reference for Accordion HTML component.
headings: Accordion details.accordion - Group .card[role="group"] - Attribute name - Part - Optional wrappers for child content. Variants .text The variant to use.

title: Avatar API
description: Reference for Avatar Astro component.
headings: as any - The element or component to render as. href string - The link to use if the avatar is an anchor. variant "squared" | "rounded" | "squircle" "default" The visual style of the avatar. isGroup boolean false Renders the avatar as a group. src string - The image source for the avatar. alt string - The alternative text for the avatar image.

title: Avatar API
description: Reference for Avatar HTML component.
headings: Variants - Sets the shape of the avatar. Container [role="group"] - Required for grouped avatars.

title: Badge API
description: Reference for Badge Astro component.
headings: alignment "start-end" Position of the badge relative to its container. color - The color variant of the badge. dot boolean false Renders the badge as a simple dot. invisible boolean false Hides the badge. label string | number - Screen reader label for the badge.

title: Badge API
description: Reference for Badge HTML component.
headings: Container .anchor.badge - Floating .anchor-floating - Positioned floating container from Anchor. Indicator .badge-indicator - Alignment .start-end Position modifiers on .badge. Color - Color modifiers on .badge. Variants .dot - Shape modifier on .badge. Visibility .invisible - Visibility modifier on .badge.

title: Button API
description: Reference for Button Astro component.
headings: size "small", "large" - The size of the button. variant - The visual variant of the button. color "critical", "primary" - href string - disabled boolean - Button disabled state.

title: Button API
description: Reference for Button HTML component.
headings: Sizes .small, default, .large - The size of the element. Variants - The variant to use. Colors .critical, .primary - Color modifiers. Default is a neutral gray.

title: Button Group API
description: Reference for Button Group Astro component.
headings: color "critical", "primary" - orientation "vertical" - The layout orientation of the group. size "small" | "large" - The size of the buttons in the group. variant "outlined" | "tonal" | "filled" - The visual style of the buttons in the group.

title: Button Group API
description: Reference for Button Group HTML component.
headings: Colors .critical, .primary - Orientation .vertical - Orientation modifier. Sizes .small, .large - Size modifiers. Variants - Style modifiers.

title: Callout API
description: Reference for Callout Astro component.
headings: variant "tonal" | "outlined" "tonal" The visual style of the callout. severity "ok" | "warning" | "critical" - The severity level, affecting the color and icon.

title: Callout API
description: Reference for Callout HTML component.
headings: Part & > .content, & > svg - Internal structure. Severities - Severity modifiers. Variants .tonal, .outlined .tonal Style modifiers.

title: Card API
description: Reference for Card Astro component.
headings: Slots - Optional slots. actionsAlign - Alignment for the actions slot. variant "text" The variant to use.

title: Card API
description: Reference for Card HTML component.
headings: Children - Optional wrappers for child content. Variants .text The variant to use. Alignment .align-end - Align actions to the end.

title: Checkbox API
description: Reference for Checkbox Astro component.
headings: checked boolean false Input checked state. disabled boolean - Input disabled state. critical boolean - Input error state. hideLabel boolean - Visually hides the label. indeterminate boolean false required boolean false Input required state. size "small" | "large" - The size of the input. spread boolean false Spreads the label and input to opposite ends. stack boolean false Stacks the label under the input. default The label text for the component. end-text

title: Checkbox API
description: Reference for Checkbox HTML component.
headings:
Children .label, .end-text - Internal element classes. Layout .spread, .stack, default
      - Sizes .small, .large - Size modifiers. Validation .critical - Error state modifier. State data-indeterminate -

title: Chip API
description: Reference for Chip Astro component.
headings: as "div" | "a" | "button" The underlying HTML element. label string - The text label to display. multiline boolean false Allows multiline text. size "small" - The size of the chip. variant "tonal" | "outlined" "tonal" The visual variant.

title: Chip API
description: Reference for Chip HTML component.
headings: Container - Container element type. Children & > .text, & > svg - Optional child content. Sizes - The size of the element. Variants .tonal, .outlined .tonal The variant to use.

title: Dialog API

title: Drawer API
description: Reference for Drawer Astro component.
headings:
id string auto-generated Unique identifier. Defaults to a stable auto-generated id when omitted. side "inline-start", "inline-end",
        "block-start", "block-end" "inline-start" The side it opens from. backdrop "transparent", "blurred" "blurred" The backdrop style. scrollLock boolean true Whether to lock page scroll. class string - Optional CSS class. closedby "any", "closerequest", "none" "any" How the drawer is closed. heading - - The drawer title. default - - Main content area. actions - - Bottom action area. actions

title: Drawer API
description: Reference for Drawer HTML component.
headings:
Sides .inline-start, .inline-end,
        .block-start, .block-end .inline-start The side it opens from. Close behavior closedby="any", closedby="closerequest",
        closedby="none" closedby="any" How the drawer is closed. Backdrop .backdrop-transparent - Removes the backdrop blur. Autofocus autofocus - Focuses the drawer container (or a specific element) when opened.
        Prevents focus from jumping to the first focusable element. .header - - Top area for titles. .content - - Main content area. .actions - - Bottom action area.

title: Field Group API
description: Reference for Field Group Astro component.
headings: critical boolean false Field group error state. legend string - The text for the legend element. direction "row" - The orientation of the field group.

title: Field Group API
description: Reference for Field Group HTML component.
headings: Children - Supported child elements. Direction default, .row - The orientation of the element. Disabled [disabled] - When applied, disabled styles are shown. Validation .critical - When applied, error styles are shown.

title: Form API
description: Reference for Form Astro component.
headings: as string "form" The HTML element to render. as "fieldset", "div" "fieldset" The HTML element to render. disabled boolean - Whether the field set is disabled. as "legend" The HTML element to render. - [key: string]: any - name string - Shared name for nested input components. direction "row", "column" - The orientation of the field group.

title: Form API
description: Reference for Form HTML component.
headings: Base .form - The main form container. Base .fieldset - The field set container. Modifiers [disabled] - Whether the field set is disabled. Base .legend, legend - The label for the field set. Base .field-description - Field description for the field set. Base .field-group - Container for related input components. Variants .row, default - The orientation of the field group.

headings: Variants - The visual style of the icon button. Sizes .small - The size of the element. Colors .critical, .primary - States [disabled] - Attribute to disable the icon button.

title: List API
description: Reference for List Astro component.
headings: bordered boolean false Adds a border between list items. dense boolean false Packs the list tighter. gutterless boolean false Removes list inline padding. variant "default" | "tonal" | "transparent" - The background color variant of the list. as string - borderTop boolean false List item top border. headline string - The main text for the list item. inset boolean false Aligns with items that have a start icon. supportingText string - Extra text displayed below the headline.

title: List API
description: Reference for List HTML component.
headings: Dense ul.dense - When enabled list appears tighter packed. Gutterless ul.gutterless - When enabled list inline padding is removed. Bordered ul.bordered - Variants - Background color variants. Main parts - Building blocks in List item. Inset li.inset - Border top li.border-top - When enabled the list item will get a top border.

description: Reference for Progress HTML component.

label string - The label for the range input. startText string - endText string - Informational text below the range input. spread boolean false Spreads the label/text and input to opposite ends.
    
    
      variant 'filled' | 'default' | 'tonal' 'default' min number | string - The minimum value. max number | string - The maximum value. step number | string - The step increment. value number | string - The current value. valueSuffix string - default Slot for the label element. start-text Slot for the text between label and input. end-text Slot for the text below the input. value

headings: class "tabs" Required class for the parent container. role "tablist" Required for accessibility. class "underlined" Optional variant class. type "radio" Required for state management. class "tab-input" Required for behavior and styling. name string Shared across all tabs in the group. checked boolean Applied to the initially active tab. aria-controls ID Should match the ID of the corresponding panel. class "tab-label" Required for behavior and styling. for ID Must match the ID of the radio input. role "tab" Required for accessibility. class "tab-panel" Required for behavior and styling. role "tabpanel" Required for accessibility. aria-labelledby ID Should match the ID of the corresponding trigger.

title: Textarea API
description: Reference for Textarea Astro component.
headings: autoFit boolean false Automatically adjusts its height to content. description string - Description text displayed above the textarea. endText string - Supporting text displayed below the textarea. spread boolean false variant "filled" - The visual variant of the textarea. label Slot for the label element. description prefix suffix header footer end-text Slot for the supporting text (end text) element. supporting-text Legacy slot for the supporting text element.

title: Textarea API
description: Reference for Textarea HTML component.
headings: Children - Direct children of the root element. Field children - Auto-fit .auto-fit - Layout .spread, default - Variants default, .filled - The variant to use. Validation [data-invalid] -

title: Toggle API
description: Reference for Toggle Astro component.
headings: disabled boolean false Whether the toggle button is disabled. label string - The label text for the toggle button. name string - pressed boolean false size "default" | "small" | "x-small" "default" The size of the toggle button. type "checkbox" | "radio" "checkbox" value string - name string - size "default" | "small" | "x-small" "default" The size of the toggle group. orientation "vertical" - Changes the layout direction of the group. selection "single" | "multiple" "multiple"
